title: Modernising and mandating tax adviser registration with HMRC
body: "The measure introduces a legal requirement for tax advisers who interact with HMRC on behalf of clients to register with HMRC and meet minimum standards. This will begin from 1 April 2026, with a transitional period of at least 3 months.  HMRC will communicate the changes and provide guidance in advance. A digital registration process will be available, with a non-digital alternative for those who are digitally excluded. "
